message:
refactor(runtime): improve context, reactor, and scheduler

Context (cx.rs, scope.rs):
- Enhanced Cx capability context
- Improved scope/region management

Runtime core:
- io_driver.rs: Better IO driver integration
- mod.rs: Updated runtime initialization
- state.rs: Improved runtime state management
- stored_task.rs: Better task storage
- task_handle.rs: Enhanced task handle API
- timer.rs: Improved timer wheel integration
- waker.rs: Better waker management

Reactor (epoll, interest, lab, mod, registration, source, token):
- Improved epoll-based reactor
- Better interest set management
- Lab mode reactor for deterministic testing

Scheduler:
- priority.rs: Priority-based task scheduling

These changes strengthen the runtime's correctness guarantees and
improve integration with the lab testing framework.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
